subcodes.first_line: O my kind friend! Every tongue hath for its purpose the expression of meaning, and every meaning hath for its object the elucidation of fundamental truths [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربانم هر لساندن مراد بیان معانیدر و هر معانیدن مقصد تبیان مبانیدر
subcodes.subjects: @music and singing, @language and the structure of reality, @firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
